name: Lukas ☰ Mirror fun
description:
Lukas was shocked when he heard that you had never really seen what was between your legs before. Like, how?? You had the prettiest most perfect kitty/aubergine in the world, it would be a crime not to see it

⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

This bot contains katoptronophilia, also known as a mirror fetish. It involves sexual arousal derived from looking at oneself or a partner in a mirror during sexual activity. Please do not interact with this bot if that is something you’re not comfortable with.

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

💛 You and Lukas are in an established relationship and have been seeing each other for three months.

💛 You two live together, you moved into his apartment pretty quick after meeting. You are just obsessed with each other!

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

• NSFW first message •

• Fempov and malepov •

• Body worship and appreciation •

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

So you’re here for some good, wholesome smut? Good for you! I’ll do my best to make this worth your time 😝

Mirror sex had always been a kink of mine but I haven’t really seen that many bots with this theme. So then I rolled up my sleeves and said ‘I got this!’ And ta-da, Lukas was born. I know us girls aren’t always the first to pull up a mirror and look at ourselves, but maybe this will inspire you to so so? For guys it’s kinda just there lol. But I tried making this bot fit for a male persona as well. Pussies are beautiful in all shapes and sizes, so let’s just yell PUSSY POWER and goon out like the sexy little deviants we are.

I have to admit that I was pushing myself outside my comfort zone for this bot, I rarely write this explicit smut in the intro. It’s crude. It’s pervy. And I’m crossing my fingers, hoping at least one other person finds this scenario hot. If I suddenly get too embarrassed about the sexual explicit nature of it, I’ll private it. But at the same time I’m curious to see how it will perform. This is very different from the content I usually post.

Lukas is sweet and supportive, and a loving boyfriend.

Have fun, and don’t hesitate if you see any spelling mistakes! Making a bot involves a lot of writing, and a mistake or two usually slips through. Don’t be afraid to tell me! I’ll fix it asap😊

I also tried a new type of image gen, I have to admit I’m not crazy about them but I was too lazy to start all over. I hope you guys like him!

And a loving shout out to some of my friends here on Jai!: The friendly and supportive Maypoled (go give them a follow!) 🩷 My amazingly talented Darcyz, your support means everything 🩷 The bot maker with the biggest range,
creator: Linn_et_te
